name: K8s CrashLoop Triage
description: Triage pods stuck in CrashLoopBackOff / ImagePullBackOff / restart-count > threshold via the live openagentic_kubernetes MCP. Filters the top 5 most-troubled pods (sorted by restart count), fetches the top-offender pod's last logs via k8s_get_pod_logs, asks the platform LLM to diagnose likely root causes as one bullet per unhealthy pod, strips any chain-of-thought preamble, and renders an HTML triage runbook via webhook_response. Cluster-healthy edge case is handled — when no pods match the predicate, the report explicitly says so instead of rendering empty cards.

meta.purpose: Triage pods stuck in CrashLoopBackOff / ImagePullBackOff / restart-count > threshold; fetch the worst offender's recent logs and produce a runbook with LLM-diagnosed root causes.
how_it_works: 1. openagentic_kubernetes.k8s_list_pods enumerates pods in the namespace.
2. A filter transform keeps only pods with phase == CrashLoopBackOff/ImagePullBackOff OR restarts >= restart_threshold, sorted desc by restart count, top 5.
3. openagentic_kubernetes.k8s_get_pod_logs pulls the last log lines from the #1 offender.
4. The platform LLM diagnoses likely root causes — one bullet per unhealthy pod, referencing log evidence.
5. A CoT-stripper transform removes any LLM preamble.
6. webhook_response renders an HTML triage runbook. Cluster-healthy short-circuit: when zero pods match, the report explicitly says so.
meta.expected_output: HTML triage runbook listing the top 5 offending pods with restart counts, log excerpt from the worst offender, and LLM-diagnosed root cause bullets.
meta.useful_when: Oncall pages about pod crashes, post-deploy validation when restart counts spike, or after a node reboot to triage stragglers.

operations.value: {{ (() => { let pods = []; if (Array.isArray(input.pods)) { pods = input.pods; } else if (typeof input.content === 'string') { try { const parsed = JSON.parse(input.content); if (Array.isArray(parsed.pods)) pods = parsed.pods; } catch (e) {} } const threshold = 3; const filtered = pods.filter(p => { if (!p) return false; const s = String(p.status || ''); if (s === 'CrashLoopBackOff' || s === 'ImagePullBackOff' || s === 'Error' || s === 'OOMKilled') return true; if ((p.restarts || 0) > threshold) return true; return false; }); filtered.sort((a, b) => (b.restarts || 0) - (a.restarts || 0)); return filtered.slice(0, 5); })() }}

{{ (() => { if (typeof input.namespace === 'string' && input.namespace) return input.namespace; if (typeof input.content === 'string') { try { return JSON.parse(input.content).namespace || 'unknown'; } catch (e) {} } return 'unknown'; })() }}

{{ (() => { const u = Array.isArray(input.unhealthy) ? input.unhealthy : []; if (u.length > 0) return String(u[0].name || ''); let pods = []; if (Array.isArray(input.pods)) pods = input.pods; else if (typeof input.content === 'string') { try { const parsed = JSON.parse(input.content); if (Array.isArray(parsed.pods)) pods = parsed.pods; } catch (e) {} } return pods.length > 0 ? String(pods[0].name || '') : ''; })() }}

{{ (() => { const u = Array.isArray(input.unhealthy) ? input.unhealthy : []; if (u.length > 0 && u[0].namespace) return String(u[0].namespace); let pods = []; if (Array.isArray(input.pods)) pods = input.pods; else if (typeof input.content === 'string') { try { const parsed = JSON.parse(input.content); if (Array.isArray(parsed.pods)) pods = parsed.pods; } catch (e) {} } if (pods.length > 0 && pods[0].namespace) return String(pods[0].namespace); if (typeof input.namespace === 'string' && input.namespace) return input.namespace; return 'agentic-dev'; })() }}

data.label: Diagnose Root Causes
data.prompt:
You are an SRE triaging pods that are stuck in a bad state in Kubernetes namespace {{steps.unhealthy_pods.namespace_label}}.

Unhealthy pods (JSON array of pod records, sorted by restart count desc):
{{steps.unhealthy_pods.unhealthy}}

Total pods in namespace: {{steps.unhealthy_pods.pod_count}}.
Unhealthy pod count: {{steps.unhealthy_pods.unhealthy_count}}.

Last 100 log lines from the most-troubled pod ({{steps.unhealthy_pods.top_pod_name}}):
{{steps.fetch_logs.logs}}

Output rules (MUST follow):
1. Start the response with a single `-` character — no preamble, no "Here is", no "Let me think", no thinking out loud.
2. Emit exactly one `-` bullet per unhealthy pod (one bullet for each entry in the unhealthy array). If the array is empty, emit a single bullet stating that no crashloop pods were found and recommending a routine future check.
3. For each pod, include its name verbatim, its status, its restart count, and a concrete root-cause hypothesis with a short remediation hint.
4. Reference concrete signal words from the log text (error class names, missing relation names, exception types) when applicable so the operator can grep.

data.label: HTML Triage Runbook
data.bodyTemplate:
K8s CrashLoop Triage — namespace {{steps.unhealthy_pods.namespace_label}}

Total pods scanned: {{steps.unhealthy_pods.pod_count}} · Unhealthy: {{steps.unhealthy_pods.unhealthy_count}} · Restart threshold: {{trigger.restart_threshold || "3"}} · Top offender: {{steps.unhealthy_pods.top_pod_name}}

Operator Diagnoses

{{steps.clean_diagnoses.clean_content}}

Unhealthy Pods (sorted by restart count)

{{steps.unhealthy_pods.unhealthy}}

Last 100 log lines — {{steps.unhealthy_pods.top_pod_name}}

{{steps.fetch_logs.content}}
